product/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.2 to 3.2.0 to align with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.x ecosystem.
product/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6 APIs required for modern JDKs.

product/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
product/pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin will fail or produce incompatible bytecode if the source/target version is not set to 21 for a Java 21 migration.
